name: Red Hill Community Market
address: Red Hill Showgrounds, Arthurs Seat Rd, Red Hill VIC 3937
editorNote: The Red Hill Community Market is still the cleanest expression of upper-Peninsula weekend culture: growers, pantry stalls, ceramics, linen, very good coffee, and enough local texture to make the whole region feel less polished and more inhabited. It works best when treated as a beginning rather than the main event. Arrive early, move quickly through the first pass, then take your produce and appetite into the rest of the day. If you are building a Saturday around Red Hill, this is where to start.

heroImage.alt: Morning crowds and produce stalls at the Red Hill Community Market
